-(%0A%09%22bufio%22%0A%09%22fmt%22%0A%09%22os%22%0A%09%22sort%22%0A%09%22strings%22%0A)%0A%0Afunc backtrack(chars %5B%5Drune, current %5B%5Drune, visited %5B%5Dbool) %7B%0A%09if len(current) == len(chars) %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Println(string(current))%0A%09%09return%0A%09%7D%0A%09for i := 0; i %3C len(chars); i++ %7B%0A%09%09if visited%5Bi%5D %7B%0A%09%09%09continue%0A%09%09%7D%0A%0A%09%09visited%5Bi%5D = true%0A%09%09current = append(current, chars%5Bi%5D)%0A%09%09backtrack(chars, current, visited)%0A%0A%09%09current = current%5B:len(current)-1%5D%0A%09%09visited%5Bi%5D = false%0A%09%7D%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09scanner := bufio.NewScanner(os.Stdin)%0A%09if !scanner.Scan() %7B%0A%09%09return%0A%09%7D%0A%09s := strings.TrimSpace(scanner.Text())%0A%0A%09chars := %5B%5Drune(s)%0A%09sort.Slice(chars, func(i, j int) bool %7B%0A%09%09return chars%5Bi%5D %3C chars%5Bj%5D%0A%09%7D)%0A%0A%09visited := make(%5B%5Dbool, len(chars))%0A%09var current %5B%5Drune%0A%0A%09backtrack(chars, current, visited)%0A
